hero_subtitle: SFTY helps VASPs turn fragmented transaction alerts and wallet risk signals into structured triage workflows that streamline review, evidence preservation, and case management.
trust_card_1_value: Identity checks connected to onboarding decisions
trust_card_2_value: Corporate verification, UBO review and entity risk
trust_card_3_value: Wallet and transaction monitoring in one workflow
trust_card_4_value: Message routing, completeness checks and exception handling
trust_card_5_value: Regulatory changes mapped to internal rule
trust_card_6_value: Decision logs and evidence for every review
problem_description: Compliance teams struggle to triage high volumes of transaction alerts spread across multiple KYT and wallet risk providers. This fragmentation delays decision-making, weakens audit trails, and complicates linking alerts to customer and transaction cases.
problem_point_1_value: KYC, KYB, KYT and Travel Rule outputs sit in separate tools
problem_point_2_value: Teams move data between dashboards, spreadsheets and internal notes
problem_point_3_value: Regulatory changes are hard to map into internal workflows
problem_point_4_value: Evidence and decision history are difficult to reconstruct later
solution_description: SFTY links multiple KYT and wallet risk provider alerts with customer and transaction data to create streamlined, auditable triage workflows that speed decision-making and preserve case evidence.
workflow_title: From transaction alerts to case evidence
workflow_description: SFTY organizes transaction monitoring alerts through risk review, case creation, decision logging and evidence preservation within a structured compliance workflow.
workflow_step_1_description: KYC, KYB, KYT and screening outputs enter SFTY
workflow_step_2_description: Risk rules route checks into the right workflow
workflow_step_3_description: A case opens with customer, wallet and provider context
workflow_step_4_description: Teams review, decide and record the outcome
workflow_step_5_description: Logs, decisions and reports stay ready for audit
why_sfty_title: Beyond transaction alerts. One triage layer
why_sfty_description: SFTY connects transaction alerts with wallet risk, sanctions signals, cases and evidence to give compliance teams a structured, audit-ready alert triage workflow.
why_sfty_card_1_description: Work above existing KYC, KYB, KYT and Travel Rule tools
why_sfty_card_2_description: Turn disconnected outputs into structured reviews and cases
why_sfty_card_3_description: Preserve evidence, reviewer actions and decision history
why_sfty_card_4_description: Give compliance, risk and leadership one operating view
authority_description: SFTY supports VASPs with structured triage workflows, preserving audit-ready evidence and enabling bank due diligence within controlled, enterprise-grade deployment environments.
authority_card_1_description: Connect KYC, KYB, KYT, Travel Rule and screening providers into one workflow
authority_card_2_description: Preserve provider outputs, reviewer notes, decisions and supporting records
authority_card_3_description: Prepare clearer compliance evidence for banks, partners and external review
authority_card_4_description: Support private environments, permissions, integrations and internal governance
ask_sfty_placeholder: How can SFTY support transaction alert triage workflows
ask_sfty_chip_1_message: Explain how transaction alerts become structured compliance cases
ask_sfty_chip_2_message: Show how audit evidence is preserved during alert triage
ask_sfty_chip_3_message: Describe how provider outputs connect within alert review workflows
ask_sfty_helper_text: AI assistant for product, deployment and compliance questions
faq_description: Clear answers on provider orchestration, Travel Rule workflows, audit evidence and enterprise compliance operations.
faq_1_question: What is SFTY for transaction alert triage?
faq_1_answer: SFTY structures transaction alerts into triage workflows, linking wallet and transaction risks to customers, counterparties, and cases for clear compliance review.
faq_2_question: How does SFTY manage KYT alert workflows?
faq_2_answer: SFTY routes KYT alerts through configurable rules, linking them to related wallets, transactions, and cases while supporting manual review and escalation workflows.
faq_3_question: How does SFTY preserve transaction evidence?
faq_3_answer: SFTY preserves evidence history by recording alert data, reviewer decisions, case notes and supporting provider outputs for audit-ready traceability.
faq_4_question: Can SFTY integrate with existing KYT providers?
faq_4_answer: Yes. SFTY connects outputs from multiple KYT and blockchain analytics providers without replacing them, connecting risk signals in one compliance workflow.
faq_5_question: Does SFTY replace existing transaction monitoring tools?
faq_5_answer: No. SFTY acts as a compliance control layer above existing monitoring tools, turning their outputs into structured cases, decisions and reports.
final_title: Turn transaction alerts into structured triage workflows
final_description: Explore how SFTY helps VASP compliance teams connect KYT alerts to evidence, case management and audit-ready operational workflows.
footer_description: Supervisory and compliance control layer for digital asset markets, businesses and regulated institutions.

footer_legal_notice: This page is for informational purposes only and does not constitute legal, regulatory or compliance advice. SFTY deployment depends on jurisdiction, client requirements and applicable laws.
